'''Rydar II''' was the original [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Ranat/Legends|Ranat]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. The local [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] had the Ranats exterminated in [[200 BBY/Legends|200 BBY]]. Only three individuals escaped, ending up on nearby [[Aralia/Legends|Aralia]].

[[File:Ranat_UAA.png|thumb|left|upright|A Ranat.]]

==History==
Rydar II was located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] of the [[Antemeridian sector/Legends|Antemeridian sector]], which bordered the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] and crossed by the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]].

During the [[Jedi Civil War]], Rydar II fell into the [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] area and during the [[Ruusan campaign]] the planet resumed in [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] the planet was in [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] territory.

Ranats evolved on the planet Rydar II. The Rydans, a humanoid species, did not understand the Ranats and tried to eradicate them. The Ranats often attacked the Rydans children who had enough of them. Two [[Gender/Legends|male]] and female Ranat could flee a few [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] with a [[Starship/Legends|ship]] to [[Aralia/Legends|Aralia]], whereafter a very new colony could soon emerge. The three surviving Ranat heroes chose the Aralia [[Jungle/Legends|jungles]] near the shores to set up their new habitat.

After the defeat of the Empire, [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Targan]] was the representative of Rydar II.
